IEntityCollectionReadMethodBase Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The IEntityCollectionReadMethodBase type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ClauseProviders
Gets the registered filter clause providers for this method.
DefaultOrderBy
Gets or sets the default ORDER BY clause.
DisableHierarchicalData Obsolete.
This setting has no meaning.
DoNotSortOnApiServer
IsSearchAfterLoad
Gets or sets a flag indicating which strategy to apply when using the search index to obtain data.
LoadType
Gets or sets the type of entities to load.
WhereClauseProviders
Gets the registered WHERE clause providers for this method.
